items.title: Malen maakt Totti-achtig doelpunt in het bijzijn van de grote meester zelf
items.summary: AS Roma heeft maandagavond gewonnen van Cagliari. Donyell Malen was de grote man in de Serie A-confrontatie, hij bezorgde Roma de punten door beide goals te maken. Vooral het openingsdoelpunt was beeldschoon.

items.title: Chelsea's head of women's football Green leaves club
items.summary: Paul Green leaves his role as Chelsea's head of women's football after 13 years - and 19 trophies - with the Women's Super League club.

items.title: Sources: Cristiano Ronaldo ends Al Nassr dispute
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has decided to end his boycott of Al Nassr games, sources have told ESPN Brasil.

items.title: Laporta resigns as Barça president, will re-stand
items.summary: Joan Laporta has resigned as Barcelona president ahead of re-standing for the role when club members go to the polls on March 15.

items.title: Cazorla: 'LaLiga light years away from the PL'
items.summary: Santi Cazorla has taken a swipe at LaLiga after his team's league game at Rayo Vallecano on Saturday afternoon was postponed just hours before kickoff.

items.title: Head of women's football at Chelsea leaves club
items.summary: Chelsea have confirmed the departure of Head of Women's Football, Paul Green, after a 13-year spell.

items.title: Dingsdag dankt KNVB: 'Ik kan computeren, maar dat was vooral Tetris'
items.summary: Michael Dingsdag gidste FC Volendam zaterdag naar een belangrijke zege op PEC Zwolle . De assistent-trainer, die de grieperige Rick Kruys verving, kreeg onlangs te horen dat hij na vier afwijzingen eindelijk is toegelaten tot de UEFA Pro-cursus. 'Het heeft een tijd geduurd.'

items.title: Grealish komt dit seizoen niet meer in actie voor Everton
items.summary: Jack Grealish komt dit seizoen niet meer in actie voor Everton. De flamboyante Engelsman is geopereerd aan zijn voet, zo maakt hij maandagavond zelf bekend op zijn Instagram-profiel.

items.title: 'Didn't want the season to end like this' - Grealish has surgery
items.summary: Jack Grealish says he "didn't want the season to end like this" after confirming he has had surgery on a foot stress fracture.

items.title: FC Dordrecht jaagt op meer, Jong PSV best of the rest
items.summary: Jong PSV heeft maandagavond de derde positie van de Keuken Kampioen Divisie overgenomen van De Graafschap. TOP Oss werd verslagen op De Herdgang. Een andere beloftenploeg verloor in eigen huis: Jong AZ ging onderuit tegen FC Dordrecht.

items.title: Van Bommel: 'PSV heeft op elke positie een betere speler dan Ajax en Feyenoord'
items.summary: Begin februari lijkt PSV het kampioenschap niet meer te kunnen ontgaan. Ook aan de tafel van Rondo was de Eindhovense overmacht onderwerp van gesprek.

items.title: Casemiro proved his doubters wrong. Now Manchester United must try to replace him
items.summary: The Brazilian was often exposed by the tactics of Ten Hag and Amorim, but was always adaptable and a replacement will be expensive “Leave the football before the football leaves you.” The meme-baiting quote from Jamie Carragher hung heavy over Casemiro for a long while, but it is testament to the Brazilian’s character and durability that he will leave Manchester United this year on his own terms, two years after those infamous words from the former Liverpool player. In fairness to Carragher, context at the time was key. After United were hammered 4-0 by Crystal Palace in May 2024, Casemiro looked spent at the elite level, bypassed too easily in increasingly fast‑tempo matches and left for dead by Erik ten Hag’s high-risk tactics. Continue reading...

items.title: Team GB's medal wait continues after Brookes and Muir fall short
'Late start bound to cost Aston Martin,' Newey admits as livery revealed
items.summary: Adrian Newey admitted Aston Martin's late start on their 2026 Formula 1 challenger is "bound to" impact the team's results in the early stages of the new season.

items.title: Pakistan end T20 World Cup boycott and prepared to face India
items.summary: Pakistan have ended a proposed boycott for their T20 World Cup match against India and will play as scheduled this Sunday, live on Sky Sports.

items.title: Forest latest: Dyche ignoring background noise in survival bid
Watford appoint Edward Still as head coach
items.summary: Watford appoint Edward Still as head coach following the resignation of Javi Gracia after only three months in charge.

items.title: Sutton's predictions v golf superstar & Arsenal fan Ian Poulter
items.summary: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on golf superstar Ian Poulter plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this week's midweek Premier League fixtures.

items.title: You may not like the Liverpool red card, but it was the right call | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: Referee Craig Pawson sent off Dominik Szoboszlai by the letter of the law; the only way it should be done Sign up for Soccer with Jonathan Wilson here Refereeing is the most thankless of jobs. There are times when you can get a decision absolutely right and still you get criticised on all sides. In the final seconds at Anfield on Sunday, with the Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson caught upfield, Rayan Cherki rolled the ball towards the Liverpool goal. Erling Haaland gave chase and would have gotten there to nudge the ball definitively over the line but he was pulled back by Dominik Szoboszlai, who would then have caught up with the ball to clear had he not been pulled back by Haaland. The ball crossed the line but the referee Craig Pawson, after a VAR review, gave not a goal but a free-kick for the first offence, sending Szoboszlai off for the denial of an obvious goal-scoring opportunity. Continue reading...

items.title: Late goals are destroying Liverpool's season and solution isn't obvious
items.summary: Why have Liverpool gone from mentality monsters to a side there for the taking?
